title: Conditional for advice: tu devrais
subtitle: Give advice without sounding too strong.
duolingoBridge: This builds on earlier advice phrases and makes them more natural.
overview: Knowledge point 1: devoir in conditional gives advice: tu devrais.
Knowledge point 2: on pourrait suggests an option.

items.fr: Tu devrais écouter cette phrase plusieurs fois.
items.en: You should listen to this sentence several times.
items.es: Deberías escuchar esta frase varias veces.

items.fr: À ta place, je parlerais plus lentement.
items.en: If I were you, I would speak more slowly.
items.es: En tu lugar, hablaría más despacio.

items.fr: Ce serait mieux de réserver maintenant.
items.en: It would be better to book now.

items.fr: Je te conseille de pratiquer un peu chaque jour.
items.en: I advise you to practice a little each day.
items.es: Te aconsejo practicar un poco cada día.
